extortion.description: [AI generated] Món Sant Benet is a unique cultural, tourist, and leisure project in Catalonia, Spain. It encompasses a medieval monastery that dates back to the 10th century, the modernist summer home of the famous painter Ramón Casas, the Alícia Foundation (which focuses on gastronomic research), and a luxury 4-star hotel. The company offers fascinating tours, events, gastronomy experiences, and education workshops.
